channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Meet the 11 Black Fortune 500 CEOs leading firms with over $432 billion in combined revenue
item.description: Black CEOs make up only 2% of the largest U.S. corporations.

item.title: How FIFA restructured the World Cup into its biggest payday, as host cities face budget shortfalls
item.description: Gianni Infantino promised to quadruple FIFA's income in 2016, now delivering a record tournament likened to 104 Super Bowls.

item.title: Aflac general counsel: Georgia lawmakers took a key step on sickle cell disease, but more work remains
item.description: A new Georgia law requires Medicaid to keep up with sickle cell treatments. On World Sickle Cell Day, the push for broader action continues.

item.title: TIAA CEO says work-life balance is a myth, found a better approach after breaking down at a bus terminal
item.description: Thasunda Brown Duckett now views her life as a diversified portfolio, which she says has led to her success.
